description.ko: 비 내리는 밤의 어둠을 뚫고 네온 불빛이 빛나는 미래 도시의 숨막히는 전경으로, 기술 발전과 도시 밀집도의 정점을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a futuristic city where neon lights pierce through the darkness of a rainy night, showcasing the peak of technological advancement and urban density.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at night, towering skyscrapers with glowing neon signs in cyan and magenta, flying vehicles with light trails, rain-slicked streets reflecting city lights, high-tech dystopian atmosphere, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution, ray tracing, futuristic architecture.
